title: Take-away game
description: Win and loss claims about a take-1-or-2 stones game, bounded at 4 stones.

tokens.label: Always-present token
tokens.description: The distinguished token present in every state.

tokens.label: 0 is a loss
tokens.description: With 0 stones, the player to move loses.

tokens.label: 1 is a loss
tokens.description: With 1 stone, the player to move loses.

tokens.label: 2 is a loss
tokens.description: With 2 stones, the player to move loses.

tokens.label: 3 is a loss
tokens.description: With 3 stones, the player to move loses.

tokens.label: 4 is a loss
tokens.description: With 4 stones, the player to move loses.

tokens.label: 0 is a win
tokens.description: With 0 stones, the player to move wins.

tokens.label: 1 is a win
tokens.description: With 1 stone, the player to move wins.

tokens.label: 2 is a win
tokens.description: With 2 stones, the player to move wins.

tokens.label: 3 is a win
tokens.description: With 3 stones, the player to move wins.

tokens.label: 4 is a win
tokens.description: With 4 stones, the player to move wins.
